caption: A wide city street is flanked by large, multi-story beige buildings under an overcast sky. Several people are walking across the street in the foreground. A woman in a black jacket and white pants walks alongside a person in a white t-shirt and dark pants. Further right, another person wearing a white t-shirt and dark pants walks toward the right, followed by a woman in a light blue shirt and jeans. In the background, a red traffic light is visible. As the scene progresses, the group of pedestrians continues their movement across the roadway from left to right. The background architecture, including a large hotel-like building with a tiered roof and a curved modern building, remains stationary. The lighting and weather conditions stay consistent throughout the sequence, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos.
